description: Style NoteLight weight jackets that are stylish and trendy while keeping you warm helps you beat the monsoon chill in style. This jacket from adidas are simply must haves for those who like to look fashionable always. Product DetailsWhite and blue jacket, has a zipped placket, mock collar, long sleeves with ribbed cuffs and Adidas three stripes on the sleeve, branding on the chest on the left side, two zipped pockets above the hemline on the side and a zippered compartment in the mock collar with the hood which has a drawstring tie to customise Fit Material and Care100% polyesterMachine wash coldDo not bleach or tumble dryUse cool ironSize and FitRegular FitThe model (height 6' and shoulders 18”) is wearing a size M
